title: KFC (No Cruelty)
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://www.gazoakleychef.com/recipes/kentucky-fried-chickn-burger/ ✓ VERIFIED  (Gaz Oakley's KFC-style chick'n burger; alt: https://www.gazoakleychef.com/recipes/vegan-fried-chicken-experiment/)
- **Description:** Marinated scratch seitan (vital wheat gluten + KFC-style 11-spice blend, made in-house in 5-lb batches) with buttermilk-substitute dredge, pressure- or deep-fried in peanut oil. Scratch-seitan keeps food cost in the fast-food zone; Beyond Chicken Tenders are the fast-casual premium tier.
- **Wholesale food cost:** **$0.95 / serving** (4-piece basket, scratch seitan) · **Menu price:** **$5–8** (fast-food tier)
- **Weight:** 220 g · **Calories:** 480 · **Protein:** 24 g · **Time:** 45 min (seitan made ahead in bulk; fries per ticket) · **Servings:** 4
- **Restaurant difficulty:** **Medium** — per-plate fry. **Tags:** 🥘 (seitan bulk-prep) · ⚡

| Sub | Effect | Cost delta |
|---|---|---|
| Scratch seitan (default fast-food lead) | True fast-food economics | baseline ($0.95) |
| **Premium upsell:** Beyond Chicken Tenders (5-lb foodservice) | Branded; fast-casual tier | +$1.20 → $2.15 / menu $9–12 |
| **Premium upsell:** Impossible Nuggets reformatted as tenders | Pre-breaded, no fry-batter step | +$1.10 → $2.05 / menu $9–12 |
description: Marinated scratch seitan (vital wheat gluten + KFC-style 11-spice blend, made in-house in 5-lb batches) with buttermilk-substitute dredge, pressure- or deep-fried in peanut oil. Scratch-seitan keeps food cost in the fast-food zone; Beyond Chicken Tenders are the fast-casual premium tier.

subs.from: **Premium upsell:** Impossible Nuggets reformatted as tenders

title: McNuggets (No Cruelty)
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://itdoesnttastelikechicken.com/vegan-chicken-nuggets/ ✓ VERIFIED
- **Description:** TVP-and-vital-wheat-gluten homemade nuggets, hand-formed and breaded. The TVP base is foodservice-cheap (~$4/lb, 0.5 oz dry per 6pc) and replicates the soft-bite QSR-nugget mouthfeel. Par-fry & freeze, finish on order.
- **Wholesale food cost:** **$0.55 / 6-pc** · **Menu price:** **$4–6** (6pc) / **$7–9** (10pc) — fast-food tier
- 180 g · 380 cal · 22 g · 35 min · 4 batches of 6pc · **Easy** (par-fry, finish on order) · 🥘 ⚡

| Sub | Effect | Cost delta |
|---|---|---|
| TVP-seitan baseline (default) | True fast-food food cost | baseline ($0.55) |
| **Premium upsell:** Impossible Nuggets (foodservice 5-lb, pre-breaded) | Branded, no scratch labor | +$1.10 → $1.65 / menu $8–11 |
| **Premium upsell:** Beyond Chicken Pieces, formed | Pre-marinated tenders | +$1.00 → $1.55 / menu $8–11 |
description: TVP-and-vital-wheat-gluten homemade nuggets, hand-formed and breaded. The TVP base is foodservice-cheap (~$4/lb, 0.5 oz dry per 6pc) and replicates the soft-bite QSR-nugget mouthfeel. Par-fry & freeze, finish on order.

title: Big Mac (No Cruelty)
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://theeburgerdude.com/vegan-big-mac/ ✓ VERIFIED  (faux-meat lead build); https://www.anediblemosaic.com/vegan-big-macs/ (lentil-burger baseline reference)
- **Description:** Three-bun architecture with special sauce, shredded lettuce, pickles, onion, vegan cheese. **Two protein tiers** — pick one based on your menu concept:
  - **Fast-food lead:** Bean-lentil-walnut patties (formed in-house, $0.30/4-oz patty) × 2 → sub-$1 food cost
  - **Fast-casual lead:** Beyond Burger 4-oz patties × 2 (the v4 Beyond-led build preserved here as the premium tier)
- **Wholesale food cost:** **$0.85 / serving** (bean-patty baseline) / **$5.10 / serving** (Beyond premium)
- **Menu price:** **$5–8** (fast-food tier) / **$13–16** (fast-casual)
- **Weight:** 320 g · **Calories:** 640 (bean) / 720 (Beyond) · **Protein:** 22 g (bean) / 32 g (Beyond) · **Time:** 12 min · **Servings:** 1
- **Restaurant difficulty:** **Easy** — flat-top griddle, assemble. **Tags:** 🥘 (patties bulk-prep) · ⚡

| Sub | Effect | Cost delta |
|---|---|---|
| **Lead protein:** Bean-lentil-walnut patty (default — fast-food tier) | Sub-$1 food cost; clean-label; bulk-prep + freeze | baseline ($0.85) |
| **Premium upsell:** Beyond Burger 4-oz patty × 2 | v4 Beyond-led build; brand recognition; fast-casual tier | +$4.25 → $5.10 / menu $13–16 |
| **Premium upsell:** Impossible Burger 4-oz patty × 2 | Slightly tighter griddle behavior | +$4.15 → $5.00 / menu $13–16 |
| Tofurky / Field Roast 2.5-oz patties × 2 | Mid-tier — better than scratch, cheaper than Beyond | +$1.40 → $2.25 / menu $7–10 |
description: Three-bun architecture with special sauce, shredded lettuce, pickles, onion, vegan cheese. **Two protein tiers** — pick one based on your menu concept:

subs.effect: Sub-$1 food cost; clean-label; bulk-prep + freeze
v4 Beyond-led build; brand recognition; fast-casual tier
Mid-tier — better than scratch, cheaper than Beyond

title: Crunchwrap Supreme (No Cruelty)
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://rainbowplantlife.com/the-best-vegan-crunchwrap-supreme/ ✓ VERIFIED  (Rainbow Plant Life — recipe leads with homemade lentil-mushroom-walnut taco meat, perfect for the fast-food tier; Beyond Beef called out as a faster substitute)
- **Description:** Layered tortilla crunchwrap with vegan nacho cheese (cashew-based), crisped tostada, lettuce, tomato, sour cream, folded and griddled. **Two protein tiers:**
  - **Fast-food lead:** Homemade lentil-mushroom-walnut taco meat (the RPL recipe's default) — sub-$1.50 food cost
  - **Fast-casual lead:** Beyond Beef crumbled taco-style (the v4 Beyond-led build, preserved here as a premium option)
- **Wholesale food cost:** **$1.20 / serving** (lentil-walnut baseline — near-floor for the format; the multi-component crunchwrap simply has too many fillings for true sub-$1) / **$4.40 / serving** (Beyond premium)
- **Menu price:** **$5–8** (fast-food tier) / **$11–14** (fast-casual)
- **Weight:** 360 g · **Calories:** 580 (lentil) / 680 (Beyond) · **Protein:** 22 g (lentil) / 26 g (Beyond) · **Time:** 30 min (taco meat bulk-preps in advance; assemble per ticket) · **Servings:** 2
- **Restaurant difficulty:** **Medium** — folded press requires care; taco meat and queso bulk-prep on Mon/Wed/Fri. **Tags:** 🥘 (taco meat + queso) · ⚡ (assembly fast)

| Sub | Effect | Cost delta |
|---|---|---|
| **Lead protein:** Lentil-mushroom-walnut taco meat (default — fast-food tier; from the RPL recipe) | Sub-$1.50 food cost; clean-label; bulk-batch & freeze | baseline ($1.20) |
| **Premium upsell:** Beyond Beef crumble (v4 Beyond-led build) | Branded; fast-casual tier | +$3.20 → $4.40 / menu $11–14 |
| **Premium upsell:** Impossible Beef crumble | Tighter crumble | +$3.10 → $4.30 / menu $11–14 |
| TVP crumbles | Cheapest; slightly less satisfying texture than RPL's lentil-walnut blend | −$0.20 → $1.00 / menu $4–7 |
description: Layered tortilla crunchwrap with vegan nacho cheese (cashew-based), crisped tostada, lettuce, tomato, sour cream, folded and griddled. **Two protein tiers:**
difficultyNote: folded press requires care; taco meat and queso bulk-prep on Mon/Wed/Fri. **Tags:** 🥘 (taco meat + queso) · ⚡ (assembly fast)

title: Chick-fil-A Sandwich (No Cruelty)
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://www.gazoakleychef.com/recipes/vegan-chick-fil-a/ ✓ VERIFIED  (Gaz Oakley)
- **Description:** Pickle-brined scratch seitan, peanut-oil-fried, on toasted bun. **Fast-food lead** with seitan, **fast-casual upsell** with Beyond Chicken Tender slab.
- **Wholesale food cost:** **$1.20 / serving** (scratch seitan) / **$2.40 / serving** (Beyond Chicken Tender)
- **Menu price:** **$5–8** (fast-food tier) / **$9–12** (fast-casual)
- 240 g · 540 cal · 26 g · 30 min · 4 · **Medium** (per-plate fry; seitan bulk-preps) · ⚡ 🥘 (seitan)

| Sub | Effect | Cost delta |
|---|---|---|
| Scratch pickle-brined seitan (default) | True fast-food food cost | baseline ($1.20) |
| **Premium upsell:** Beyond Chicken Tender slab pickle-brined | Branded; fast-casual tier | +$1.20 → $2.40 / menu $9–12 |
description: Pickle-brined scratch seitan, peanut-oil-fried, on toasted bun. **Fast-food lead** with seitan, **fast-casual upsell** with Beyond Chicken Tender slab.

subs.from: **Premium upsell:** Beyond Chicken Tender slab pickle-brined

title: Chipotle Burrito Bowl
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://thefoodietakesflight.com/chipotle-burrito-bowl/ ✓ VERIFIED
- **Description:** Sofritas tofu, cilantro-lime rice, beans, salsas, guac. Build-line dream. **Note: this is "fast-casual," not true fast-food** — Chipotle's own model runs $9–12 menu / 30% food cost. A "Value Bowl" sub (no guac, no sour cream) hits true fast-food economics for operators that want one.
- **Wholesale food cost:** $3.20 / serving (full bowl with guac) / **$1.50 / Value Bowl** · **Menu price:** $11–14 (fast-casual) / **$7–10 (Value Bowl, fast-food)**
- 480 g · 620 cal · 22 g · 30 min · 2 · **Easy** · 🥘 ⚡

| Sub | Effect | Cost delta |
|---|---|---|
| Sofritas tofu (default) | Authentic Chipotle build | baseline ($3.20) |
| Drop guac + sour cream → "Value Bowl" | True fast-food food cost | −$1.70 → $1.50 / menu $7–10 |
| **Premium upsell:** Chunk Pulled in adobo (sofritas-grade) | Premium pulled-protein | +$2.00 → $5.20 / menu $14–17 |
description: Sofritas tofu, cilantro-lime rice, beans, salsas, guac. Build-line dream. **Note: this is "fast-casual," not true fast-food** — Chipotle's own model runs $9–12 menu / 30% food cost. A "Value Bowl" sub (no guac, no sour cream) hits true fast-food economics for operators that want one.

title: Apple Hand-Pie (No Cruelty)
rawBody:
- **URL:** https://www.noracooks.com/vegan-apple-pie/ ⚠ REFERENCE (vegan) *(Nora Cooks's full-size vegan apple pie is the verified filling base. Adapted here to the QSR hand-pie format: same filling, but enclosed in vegan puff pastry sleeves, par-baked then fried to order. **Full vegan hand-pie recipe TBD in v6.**)*
- **Description:** Spiced apple-cinnamon filling sealed in a vegan puff pastry sleeve, par-baked then deep-fried to order for the bubbled, blistered McDonald's-style crust. The QSR comfort dessert — pairs with vegan soft-serve as a "pie & cone" combo upsell.
- **Wholesale food cost:** $1.20 / piece · **Menu price:** $4–6 ea / $7–9 (pie + soft-serve combo)
- **Weight:** 90 g / piece · **Calories:** 280 · **Protein:** 3 g · **Time:** 45 min build (assemble + par-bake), 4 min fry per ticket · **Servings:** 8 / batch
- **Restaurant difficulty:** **Medium** — par-bake & freeze; fry from frozen 4 min per ticket. Holds 30+ days frozen.
- **Tags:** 🥘 Bulk-Prep (par-baked frozen) · ⚡ Fast-Service

| Sub | Effect | Cost delta |
|---|---|---|
| Apple-cinnamon (default) | QSR classic | baseline |
| Berry / cherry filling | Seasonal LTO | +$0.20 |
| Add vegan soft-serve scoop | Combo upsell | +$0.60 → menu $7–9 |
urlNote: Nora Cooks's full-size vegan apple pie is the verified filling base. Adapted here to the QSR hand-pie format: same filling, but enclosed in vegan puff pastry sleeves, par-baked then fried to order. **Full vegan hand-pie recipe TBD in v6.**
